title: OpenAI and Malta partner to bring ChatGPT Plus to all citizens
summary: OpenAI and Malta partner to expand AI access, offering ChatGPT Plus and training to help citizens build practical AI skills and use AI responsibly.
content: OpenAI and Malta partner to expand AI access, offering ChatGPT Plus and training to help citizens build practical AI skills and use AI responsibly.

light_analysis.summary: OpenAI与马耳他政府合作，为所有公民提供ChatGPT Plus订阅和AI技能培训。该合作旨在扩大AI技术的普及，帮助公民掌握实用AI技能并负责任地使用AI。这一举措将提升马耳他的数字素养，并为其他国家提供公私合作的范例。

title: How business operations teams use Codex
summary: See how business operations teams can use Codex to create initiative briefs, strategy updates, leadership decision packets, progress updates, and more from real work inputs.
content: See how business operations teams can use Codex to create initiative briefs, strategy updates, leadership decision packets, progress updates, and more from real work inputs.

light_analysis.summary: OpenAI发布文章介绍业务运营团队如何利用Codex工具，从实际工作输入中创建倡议简报、战略更新、领导决策包、进度更新等文档。Codex作为AI辅助工具，旨在提升运营效率，通过自动化文档生成简化流程。该文章展示了Codex在企业场景中的实际应用价值。

title: How data science teams use Codex
summary: See how data science teams can use Codex to build root-cause briefs, impact readouts, KPI memos, scoped analyses, and dashboard specs from real work inputs.
content: See how data science teams can use Codex to build root-cause briefs, impact readouts, KPI memos, scoped analyses, and dashboard specs from real work inputs.

light_analysis.summary: OpenAI介绍了数据科学团队如何利用Codex从实际工作输入中构建根本原因简报、影响报告、KPI备忘录、范围分析和仪表盘规范，展示了Codex在自动化数据分析报告生成方面的应用，有助于提升数据科学工作效率。

title: How sales teams use Codex
summary: See how sales teams can use Codex to create pipeline briefs, meeting prep packets, forecast reviews, account plans, and stalled-deal diagnoses from real work inputs.
content: See how sales teams can use Codex to create pipeline briefs, meeting prep packets, forecast reviews, account plans, and stalled-deal diagnoses from real work inputs.

light_analysis.summary: OpenAI 介绍了销售团队如何利用 Codex（AI 代码生成模型）自动创建管道简报、会议准备材料、预测审查报告、客户账户计划和停滞交易诊断等销售文档。该应用展示了 AI 在销售流程自动化中的潜力，通过从实际工作输入中生成结构化内容，帮助销售团队提升效率和准确性。
